name: agent-safety-boundary-kit
description: Design, generate, check, and audit safety boundaries for agents acting on a user's behalf.

interface.shortDescription: Design safety boundaries before agents interact with third parties.
interface.longDescription: A guided workflow and local checker for defining what an agent may share, do, agree to, spend, access, or escalate when acting on a user's behalf.
defaultPrompt: Design a safety boundary for this agent.
